dates.summary: ByteDance Seed officially launched Seed 2.0, marking the clearest product artifact in the day’s set and signaling continued competition from major Chinese labs. A Harvard-linked emergency-room study reported OpenAI o1 correctly diagnosed 67% of cases versus 50–55% for triage doctors, while new papers on robotics world models and budget-constrained optimization point to advances in embodied AI and cheaper model deployment.
